channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Young Tanzanian Author Highlights Women’s Empowerment and Youth Creativity
item.description: At just 13 years old, Rafat Ally Simba is making waves in Tanzania’s literary scene with her debut book, 'The First Female President.' Instead of spending her time on games or social media like many o...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs secure 3-1 victory over Orbit College in Gqeberha
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs turned the game around in the second half to claim a 3-1 win against Orbit College at Nelson Mandela Bay Stadium on Monday. Despite being behind early due to a poor goalkeeping error fro...

item.title: Pakistan Imposes Early Closing Times for Markets, Malls to Conserve Energy
item.description: The Pakistani government has announced new restrictions on business hours for markets and shopping malls nationwide, with the exception of Sindh province. Effective April 7th, these establishments are...

item.title: CS Wandayi Urges Patience as Fuel Supply Investigation Continues
item.description: Energy Cabinet Secretary Opiyo Wandayi has urged Kenyans to remain calm as investigations into the country's fuel sector continue. He warned against spreading political disinformation that could creat...

item.title: Financial Struggles of Parents with Children Diagnosed with Type 1 Diabetes
item.description: Parents of children diagnosed with Type 1 Diabetes (T1D) face continuous financial strain due to the cost of medical supplies, insulin, and monitoring devices. For mothers like Jennifer Linga and Joan...

item.title: Athi Water Announces Five-Day Water Cut for System Upgrades in Nairobi and Surrounding Counties
item.description: Residents in Nairobi and neighboring counties are set to face a five-day water interruption starting from Tuesday, April 7, 2026, until Sunday, April 12, 2026. This interruption is due to critical inf...

item.title: SAPS Captain Faces Fraud Charges in Financial Misuse Case
item.description: A 53-year-old captain within the South African Police Service (SAPS), attached to the Protection and Security Service (PSS), has been arrested and is expected to appear in the Pretoria Magistrate’s Co...

item.title: Hormuz Strait closure shifts oil revenue fortunes across the Gulf
item.description: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz following US and Israeli airstrikes on Iran at the end of February has triggered a significant disruption in global oil markets. Iran controls the narrow strait, th...

item.title: Legarda files ₱230-B emergency relief bill to counter fuel crisis from Middle East tensions
item.description: Senator Loren Legarda has filed a proposed ‘Bayanihan 3’ law aimed at granting the President temporary emergency powers to address the worsening effects of rising fuel and energy costs linked to the o...

item.title: Tiger Woods Faces DUI Scandal as Vanessa Trump Stands by Him
item.description: American golf legend Tiger Woods, aged 50, has once again found himself at the centre of controversy following his arrest for driving under the influence in late March 2026. According to reports, Wood...

item.title: Political panel discusses Mark Carney’s challenges from populist movements on both sides
item.description: The National Post’s Full Comment podcast, hosted by Brian Lilley, explores the political pressures facing Prime Minister Mark Carney as he navigates a rising tide of populism in Canada. Lilley is join...

item.title: Kenyan stars struggle to monetise TikTok fame due to low brand engagement and limited local opportunities
item.description: The article explores why many Kenyan celebrities, despite having massive popularity on TikTok, are not making good money from the platform. It points out that TikTok has become one of Kenya’s biggest ...

item.title: F-15 Airman’s Radio Message Causes Tensions, Almost Derails Rescue Mission in Iran
item.description: A brief radio message from a missing F-15 airman almost led to a major rescue operation being compromised. U.S. President Donald Trump revealed that the message, which included the phrase ‘Power be to...

item.title: Annual West Yorkshire Easter coal-carrying championship draws hundreds
item.description: In the village of Gawthorpe, near Ossett in West Yorkshire, hundreds of participants showcased their strength in the quirky annual World Coal Carrying Championships held every Easter Monday. The 2026 ...

item.title: DTI warns consumers of possible price hikes in food
item.description: The Department of Trade and Industry (DTI) has issued a warning about potential adjustments in food prices, citing factors like supply issues and rising oil prices as contributing reasons. While the D...

item.title: Francis Atwoli Responds to Uhuru Kenyatta's Criticism of President Ruto
item.description: Central Organisation of Trade Unions (COTU) boss Francis Atwoli has hit back at former President Uhuru Kenyatta following his remarks that seemed to criticise President William Ruto's administration. ...

item.title: Security breach at Delhi Assembly as car rams VIP gate; suspect detained within two hours
item.description: A major security breach occurred at the Delhi Legislative Assembly on Monday afternoon when a masked man in a white Tata Sierra SUV smashed through Gate 2, usually reserved for VIPs. The driver, ident...

item.title: The Ellison Family’s Expanding Influence on Global Media
item.description: The Ellison family, led by David Ellison, is rapidly emerging as a major player in the global media landscape. Following their 2025 merger of Skydance Media with Paramount Global, which granted them c...

item.title: Report of Tiger Poaching and Buried Carcass in Middle East Amid War
item.description: The news reports a sensational claim regarding a tiger in the Middle East that was allegedly poached and its carcass buried, with the story surfacing 23 days later. Authorities are reportedly investig...

item.title: Police search for driver in Lethbridge hit-and-run incident
item.description: Police in Lethbridge, Alberta, are actively searching for a driver involved in a hit-and-run incident. The crash took place recently, and authorities are urging anyone with information to come forward...
